steps.title: Convert the increase
steps.content:
An $8\%$ increase means the new population is the original population plus $8\%$ of the original population.
$$100\%+8\%=108\%$$

steps.title: Find the multiplier
steps.content:
Convert $108\%$ to a decimal multiplier.
$$108\%=\frac{108}{100}=1.08$$
So $k=1.08$. The answer is C.
